summary: 用于生成世界杯足球比赛赛后复盘，并支持标准化场景输入、赛后信息检索和球迷群通知提炼。当用户需要一句话总结这场球、这场球怎么踢的、谁踢得最好、赛后热议焦点，或明确要求全量复盘时使用。最终答案只呈现复盘内容，不添加额外段落。
description: 用于生成世界杯足球比赛赛后复盘，并支持标准化场景输入、赛后信息检索和球迷群通知提炼。当用户需要一句话总结这场球、这场球怎么踢的、谁踢得最好、赛后热议焦点，或明确要求全量复盘时使用。最终答案只呈现复盘内容，不添加额外段落。

latestVersion.changelog:
- 移除 OpenAI 配置及中文足球源探测脚本，去掉依赖相关采集与自动化逻辑。
- 大幅简化指令，仅支持世界杯赛后复盘，聚焦输出内容，不再描述采集与过滤的工具实现细节。

- 只要求内核确定和核对公开赛况事实，严格禁止模拟、猜测、自动化采集未实现的数据。
- 用户请求只输出所需复盘内容，不再添加额外段落。

summary: Read completed workouts (summaries and full per-set detail), browse and export the exercise catalog, and push custom training programs to your Speediance (Gy...
description: Read completed workouts (summaries and full per-set detail), browse and export the exercise catalog, and push custom training programs to your Speediance (Gym Monster) smart cable machine via its cloud API. Authenticates with your account credentials, caches a session token in your OS user-cache directory (override with SPEEDIANCE_TOKEN_CACHE), and makes outbound HTTPS requests to the Speediance cloud API. Reads and emits structured data — the caller decides where to store it. Ships as a single static binary — no Python or other runtime required.

latestVersion.changelog:
Speediance v1.0.5

- Token and config file locations are now OS-aware: by default, session tokens are cached in your OS user-cache directory, and config.json can reside in the working directory or OS user-config dir.
- Legacy token cache (.token.json) in the working directory is now auto-migrated to the new cache location.
- New environment variables: SPEEDIANCE_CONFIG to override the config file path, and SPEEDIANCE_TOKEN_CACHE to override the token cache location.
- Documentation updated for clarity on configuration, token location, and migration behavior.
- Improved tests and internal logic for config and token file discovery, migration, and usage.
- No breaking changes to core commands or output.

summary: Read your Google Health data from any agent. Lists data points for every Google Health data type (heart rate, resting heart rate, sleep, steps, distance, wei...
description: Read your Google Health data from any agent. Lists data points for every Google Health data type (heart rate, resting heart rate, sleep, steps, distance, weight, blood oxygen, VO2 max, exercise, and more), returns server-side daily roll-ups (one reconciled total per day), gives a parsed view of exercise sessions, and can GET any read-only v4 API path. A self-contained, read-only client for the Google Health v4 API: authenticates via OAuth2 (token cached locally and auto-refreshed) and emits JSON. It does NO filtering, merging, or writing — the caller decides what to do with the data. Single static binary, no Python or other runtime. NOTE: needs your own Google Cloud OAuth client and a one-time interactive browser login; runs headless afterward.

latestVersion.changelog:
**Config and token cache discovery logic improved to be more robust and user-friendly.**

- Token cache location defaults to a non-roaming cache directory; now migrates any previous cache from the old config dir automatically.
- Config file (`config.json`) discovery supports multiple fallback locations for greater flexibility.
- Documentation and metadata updated to clarify new config and token cache lookup order.
- Minor test and code adjustments to support the new cache/config logic.

summary: Expose local SSH servers to the public internet via aitun TCP tunnel with SSH-over-TLS routing. Each subdomain gets its own SSH endpoint on port 22 with perf...
description: Expose local SSH servers to the public internet via aitun TCP tunnel with SSH-over-TLS routing. Each subdomain gets its own SSH endpoint on port 22 with perfect isolation via SNI. Perfect for AI agents that need to provide remote SSH access behind NAT/firewall.

latestVersion.changelog:
**sshtunnel v4.7.1 Changelog**

- Installation instructions updated: recommends `curl https://aitun.cc/install.sh | bash` instead of `pip install aitun`.
- Critical section on SSH connection reuse added, with detailed examples for SSH ControlMaster and Python (paramiko).
- Explains the severe performance penalty of opening new SSH connections for every command over a tunnel.
- Step-by-step guidance provided for optimal connection reuse in CLI and programmatic contexts.
- Removed obsolete file: `skill-card.md`.

description: Chart generator skill. When triggered: - Default: CONSTRUCT ECharts option JSON and output HTML string directly and render by mermaid and support preview. - Image / vector (图片/矢量图): use CLI with --svg-output (or --svg --embed for offline). - Screenshot (截图): use CLI with --screenshot (needs Playwright). - Fine-tuning (微调/修改): open browser for interactive adjustment. Supports 6 chart types: bar, line, pie, scatter, radar, wordcloud (via JSON). Trigger words: chart, graph, visualize, plot, draw, wordcloud, vent draw图表, 画图, 可视化, 图片, 矢量图, 词云.
